stemHtml: The transponder is inoperative prior to departure and cannot be repaired at the departure aerodrome. Which option statements is correct?

options.a: The operation is allowed to the nearest suitable aerodrome where repair can be carried out.
options.b: The aircraft is grounded and can not be operated.
options.c: The pilot has to indicate the unserviceable equipment in the fight plan. ATC provides guidance for the continuation of the flight.
options.d: The flight is allowed to continue to the destination via a direct routing.
